_note: BREAK-PROBE: scheduled/timed events. Q1: can a pure-data event fire at an ABSOLUTE time (day 40)? Q2: can one fire PERIODICALLY (every 7 ticks — payday)? Q1 should work via a day counter + rising-edge. Q2 needs modulo, which the DSL lacks — this is the suspected break. A `clock` entity counts ticks; a `worker` gets paid on payday.
